note: Cold circuit compile split into D4-compile vs on-GPU CDCL equivalence-verify via program.warmup_breakdown() under XLOG_WARMUP_PROFILE=1. Linear probabilistic reachability chains (0.5::edge(i,i+1) + transitive path), fresh process per point so every compile is a real cache miss. n>=50 exceeds a CUDA grid-dimension limit on this CNF and is out of range.
metric: seconds per cold-compile stage; verify_pct_of_cold = verify / (d4_compile + verify + smooth + cache_store + cnf_hash + free_var_mask)
